definition: A soft pet that says meow.
example: We fed the cat in the morning.

definition: Something round you kick, catch, or roll.
example: She rolled the ball across the floor.

definition: You say this when food tastes good.
A tiny light in the night sky.
The flat glowing part of a TV or tablet.
example: We tapped shapes on the bright screen.

definition: The piece that fits into the wall to give power.
example: We plugged the charger into the wall.

definition: A friendly pet that barks and wags its tail.
example: The dog fetched the bright ball.

definition: A round fruit that can be red, green, or yellow.
example: She took a crunchy bite of apple.

definition: To move fast on your feet.
example: We run across the grass at recess.

definition: The bright circle we see in the night sky.
example: The moon looked silver behind thin clouds.

definition: The part of a phone that takes pictures.
example: Mom opened the camera for a photo.

definition: Soft food made from flour that we slice or toast.
example: He dipped bread into warm soup.

definition: A small animal that hops and lives near water.
example: The frog sat on a lily pad.

definition: To push off the ground into the air.
example: They jump when the coach blows the whistle.
